overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing an armored character walking through an industrial space station settlement. The character moves from a red-lit ship hangar with a massive 'HORIZON' vessel suspended overhead, through a transition area marked 'ATRIUM', into a green-lit commercial corridor with signs for 'Redemption' and 'THE DEPOT'.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial ship hangar with overhead vessel

events.description: character pauses briefly to look up at the HORIZON ship suspended overhead
approaching the Atrium doorway at the end of the hangar

agents.ego_description: walking through the red-lit ship hangar, pausing to look up at the massive vessel overhead before continuing toward the exit

notable_agents.action: sitting at a table against the wall near industrial crates

entered.detail: massive industrial vessel with 'HORIZON' lettering suspended from the ceiling
wall signage with 'JAZZ ONLY' text painted in white
metal walkway and scaffolding structure along the right wall
illuminated sign marking the entrance to the Atrium section

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a hazy, red-lit industrial ship hangar dominated by a massive 'HORIZON' vessel suspended overhead. The environment features metal platforms, scattered seating, and a 'JAZZ ONLY' sign on the left wall. An NPC sits at a table to the right as the character pauses to look up at the ship before continuing toward the Atrium doorway ahead.

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically from red-orange to greenish-white as character passes through the Atrium doorway
entering the main commercial corridor with visible shop signage and overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the Atrium doorway into a new corridor section with different lighting

entered.detail: illuminated sign for 'Redemption' mounted on the left wall
linear fluorescent lighting fixtures along the ceiling
large illuminated sign reading 'THE DEPOT' at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the Atrium doorway, triggering a dramatic shift from red to greenish artificial lighting. The HORIZON ship and jazz sign fall behind as the character enters a new corridor featuring a 'Redemption' sign and overhead fluorescent lights, with 'THE DEPOT' visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial depot corridor with seating areas

events.description: character continues walking straight, approaching The Depot entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward The Depot, passing seating areas and industrial debris

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera through the corridor

entered.detail: metal tables and stools arranged outside The Depot entrance
scattered cables and metal panels along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the green-lit commercial corridor toward The Depot, passing metal seating areas and industrial debris. An NPC walks toward the camera from the opposite direction as the character approaches the entrance marked by the large overhead sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a hazy, red-lit industrial hangar into a bright, green-lit commercial corridor. It begins with the character walking past a jazz sign and a seated NPC, pausing briefly to look up at the massive HORIZON vessel suspended overhead. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts dramatically through the Atrium doorway, where the red glow fades and is replaced by greenish artificial lighting and overhead fluorescent lamps. The camera then proceeds down this new corridor, passing a Redemption sign and industrial debris while an NPC walks toward the character from the opposite direction. The movement finally concludes as the character approaches the entrance of The Depot, marked by a large overhead sign.
